name: ACTORS: Songs Connection
overview: A VOCALOID x voice actors collaboration, featuring songs from EXIT TUNES. Within a sprawling academic metropolis lies an exclusive academy where students are encouraged to join clubs such as singing and archaeology to earn points for recognition. The most important of these is the big singing contest where all contestants have to sing in front of the entire school!

trailers.title: Opening | Titania - Sakutasuke (Gakuto Kajiwara, Wataru Urata, Yuuya Hozumi)
